message:
feat(sling): add --crew flag for targeting crew members by rig

Adds --crew flag to gt sling that expands a rig target into a crew member
path. "gt sling gt-abc gastown --crew mel" becomes "gt sling gt-abc
gastown/crew/mel". This is a natural desire path when thinking in terms of
"sling to rig X, crew member Y".

Closes: gt-12w9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
